messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Checking. Looks like Merchant A seeing order data from Merchant B in search results. Investigating.

messages.author: jake_wilson
messages.text: I see it too. Could be related to recent deploy.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Found the issue: New Elasticsearch query builder did not include tenant_id filter clause. Single-.... Deploying fix.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Confirmed resolved. Writing up incident report.
